pcos.explanation_en: PCOS is a hormonal imbalance where small cysts form in the ovaries. It causes irregular periods and raises male hormones (androgens) — leading to excess hair growth, acne, and weight gain.
pcos.explanation_ur: PCOS ek hormonal imbalance hai jisme ovaries mein chhote cysts ban jaate hain. Yeh periods irregular kar deta hai aur male hormones (androgens) zyada ho jaate hain — isi wajah se hair growth, acne, aur weight gain hoti hai.
pcos.urgency_desc_en: Especially if trying to conceive or periods missing 3+ months
pcos.urgency_desc_ur: Khaaskar agar pregnancy try kar rahi hain ya periods 3+ months se miss hain

menstrual_irregularities.explanation_en: Irregular periods can have many causes — hormonal imbalance, stress, thyroid issues, PCOS, or weight changes. Tracking your cycle pattern is important for diagnosis.
menstrual_irregularities.explanation_ur: Irregular periods kayi wajuhaat se ho sakte hain — hormonal imbalance, stress, thyroid issues, PCOS, ya weight changes. Ek cycle ka pattern track karna important hai diagnosis ke liye.
menstrual_irregularities.urgency_desc_en: Monitor at home if occasional, see a doctor soon if persistent (3+ cycles). Seek urgent care if soaking through pad/tampon every hour for 2+ hours.
menstrual_irregularities.urgency_desc_ur: Agar kabhi kabhi ho to ghar par dekhein, agar 3+ cycles se ho to doctor se milein. Agar har ghante pad/tampon bhar raha hai 2+ ghante tak to foran ER jayein.

anemia.explanation_en: Anemia happens when red blood cells or hemoglobin in the blood drop, so the body doesn't get enough oxygen. It's common in women due to heavy periods or an iron-poor diet.
anemia.explanation_ur: Anemia us waqt hota hai jab khoon mein red blood cells ya hemoglobin kam ho jaate hain, jiski wajah se body tak oxygen theek se nahi pohanchta. Women mein yeh heavy periods ya iron-poor diet ki wajah se common hai.
anemia.urgency_desc_en: Monitor at home for mild fatigue, see a doctor soon for persistent symptoms, seek urgent care for severe dizziness, fainting, or chest pain.
anemia.urgency_desc_ur: Halki thakawat ke liye ghar par dekhein, mustaqil symptoms ke liye jald doctor se milein, shadeed chakkar, behoshi, ya seenay mein dard ho to foran ER jayein.
lifestyle_tips_en: Vitamin C with iron for better absorption
lifestyle_tips_ur: Iron ke saath Vitamin C lein behtar absorption ke liye
Khane ke saath chai/coffee se parhez karein

thyroid.explanation_en: The thyroid gland controls the body's metabolism. In hypothyroidism it becomes underactive (everything slows down), and in hyperthyroidism it becomes overactive (everything speeds up). Both are identified by symptoms and confirmed with blood tests.
thyroid.explanation_ur: Thyroid gland body ka metabolism control karti hai. Hypothyroidism mein yeh kam active hoti hai (sab kuch slow ho jaata hai), aur hyperthyroidism mein zyada active (sab kuch fast ho jaata hai). Dono symptoms se identify hote hain aur blood test se confirm hote hain.
thyroid.urgency_desc_en: See a doctor soon for most cases. Seek urgent care for rapid heartbeat with chest pain, or severe weakness.
thyroid.urgency_desc_ur: Aksar cases mein jald doctor se milein. Agar seenay ke dard ke saath dil ki dhadkan tez ho ya shadeed kamzori ho to foran ER jayein.
lifestyle_tips_ur: Agar diagnosis ho chuki hai to dawai waqt par lein

endometriosis.explanation_en: In endometriosis, tissue similar to the uterine lining grows outside the uterus (ovaries, fallopian tubes). This causes severe pain, especially during periods, and can affect fertility if untreated.
endometriosis.explanation_ur: Endometriosis mein uterus ki lining jaisa tissue uterus ke bahar (ovaries, fallopian tubes) grow karta hai. Yeh severe pain ka cause banta hai, especially periods ke doran, aur agar treat na kiya jaaye toh fertility ko affect kar sakta hai.
endometriosis.urgency_desc_en: See a doctor soon for consistent pain pattern. Seek urgent care for sudden severe abdominal pain or fainting.
endometriosis.urgency_desc_ur: Agar dard mustaqil pattern mein ho to jald doctor se milein. Achanak shadeed pet dard ya behoshi ho to foran ER jayein.

menopause.explanation_en: Menopause is a natural phase when the ovaries stop producing periods, usually between ages 45-55. Perimenopause is the transition phase before it.
menopause.explanation_ur: Menopause ek natural phase hai jab ovaries periods produce karna band kar dete hain, usually age 45-55 ke darmiyan. Perimenopause uske pehle ki transition phase hai.
menopause.urgency_desc_en: Generally natural, but talk to a doctor if symptoms severely impact daily life.
menopause.urgency_desc_ur: Aam tor par natural hai, lekin agar symptoms roz marra ki zindagi ko bohat affect karein to doctor se baat karein.
lifestyle_tips_en: Calcium and Vitamin D rich diet
lifestyle_tips_ur: Thanda rahein aur layers mein kapre pehnein
Calcium aur Vitamin D wala khana khayein

uti.explanation_en: These infections are common and usually treatable with antibiotics or antifungals — early treatment avoids complications.
uti.explanation_ur: Yeh infections common hain aur usually treatable hain antibiotics ya antifungals se — early treatment complications avoid karta hai.
uti.urgency_desc_en: See a doctor soon (within 1-2 days, especially if fever is present).
uti.urgency_desc_ur: Jald doctor se milein (1-2 din ke andar, khaaskar agar bukhar ho).
lifestyle_tips_ur: Khushbu wale soap se parhez karein
